registry_safety.label: Registry Safety
registry_safety.summary: Registry state is represented by static fixture data only.

telemetry_status.label: Telemetry Status
telemetry_status.summary: Telemetry values are example display fields and are not collected by this dashboard.

worker_status.label: Worker Status
worker_status.summary: Worker state is fixture-backed and cannot launch, assign, pause, or stop workers.

pr_branch_status.label: PR Branch Status
pr_branch_status.summary: Branch context is shown as sample operator context only.

next_safe_action.label: Next Safe Action
next_safe_action.summary: Review the display-only Operator Status slice and validate the fixture shape before any commit decision.

warnings: This dashboard slice is not authoritative.
No live wiring, GitHub calls, execution buttons, services, scripts, telemetry writers, or automation are connected.
All values come from local MOCK_DATA fixture content.
